_readme: Editable TFT set knowledge injected into the agent's system prompt.
PLACEHOLDER DATA -- fill in the live set before real games:
1. Set 'set' and 'patch' to the current rotation.
2. Replace 'champions' with the real roster: name, gold cost, traits.
4. Add meta comps you want the agent to steer toward in 'comps'.
Sources: the in-client set overview, or community sites (tactics.tools,
mobalytics). Keep entries SHORT -- every champion line costs prompt
tokens on every turn. 'economy' is set-agnostic and rarely changes.
_placeholder: true entries are examples of the expected shape only.

economy.notes: hold gold at breakpoints; streaks compound; roll-down at 4-1/4-5 or when hp forces it
